description: CompositionWoven aqua green kurti made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, mandarin collar with a slit on the front that extends into a buttoned chest placket, stitch detailing on the sleeve hems, stitch detailing around the collar, embroidery on either side of the placket and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis piece of art by aurelia is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and flats for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtisHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
